old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2yr8","title":"[security] missing X25519 clamping in key derivation","description":"python/src/lichen/crypto/identity.py:99-100 uses sha512(self.seed).digest()[:32] for x25519_private without clamping (cf. _clamp in schnorr48.py:91-97 and libsodium crypto_scalarmult_curve25519). This is a key handling flaw relevant to EDHOC static DH and OSCORE key material. No constant-time guarantees from Python hashlib in hot paths. See RFC 7748 section 5 and draft-lichen-security. Commit 2984998b1 touched this code.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"agent@lichen-project.dev","created_at":"2026-07-23T00:43:14.694736733Z","created_by":"AI Agent","updated_at":"2026-07-23T00:43:14.694736733Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-2yr8","title":"[security] missing X25519 clamping in key derivation","description":"python/src/lichen/crypto/identity.py:99-100 uses sha512(self.seed).digest()[:32] for x25519_private without clamping (cf. _clamp in schnorr48.py:91-97 and libsodium crypto_scalarmult_curve25519). This is a key handling flaw relevant to EDHOC static DH and OSCORE key material. No constant-time guarantees from Python hashlib in hot paths. See RFC 7748 section 5 and draft-lichen-security. Commit 2984998b1 touched this code.","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"agent@lichen-project.dev","created_at":"2026-07-23T00:43:14.694736733Z","created_by":"AI Agent","updated_at":"2026-07-23T01:41:56.750002393Z","started_at":"2026-07-23T01:41:56.750002393Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-23T01:46:56.750002393Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-23T01:41:56.750002393Z"}
